formulas.name: Germ Theory of Disease
formulas.formula: Microorganisms are responsible for causing diseases
formulas.notes: States that microorganisms are the causative agents of many diseases

formulas.name: Sporogenesis
formulas.formula: Formation of spores by certain microorganisms
formulas.notes: Describes the process of spore formation by certain microorganisms

formulas.name: Nutritional Requirements of Microorganisms
formulas.formula: Microorganisms require nutrients for growth and multiplication
formulas.notes: States that microorganisms require nutrients for growth and multiplication

formulas.name: Antiseptics vs. Disinfectants
formulas.formula: Antiseptics are used to prevent infection in living tissues, while disinfectants are used to kill microorganisms on non-living surfaces
formulas.notes: Describes the difference between antiseptics and disinfectants

formulas.name: Principle of Sterilization by Autoclaving
formulas.formula: Heat is used to kill microorganisms
formulas.notes: States that heat is used to kill microorganisms through autoclaving

formulas.name: Importance of Microorganisms in Food Industry
formulas.formula: Microorganisms are used in food production, such as fermentation and cheese production
formulas.notes: Describes the importance of microorganisms in food production

formulas.name: Role of Microorganisms in Human Health
formulas.formula: Microorganisms can be used to produce vaccines, antibiotics, and other medicines
formulas.notes: States that microorganisms can be used to produce various medicines

formulas.name: Use of Microorganisms in Agriculture
formulas.formula: Microorganisms can be used as biofertilizers and biopesticides
formulas.notes: Describes the use of microorganisms as biofertilizers and biopesticides

formulas.name: Importance of Microorganisms in Environmental Conservation
formulas.formula: Microorganisms can be used to clean pollutants and maintain ecosystem balance
formulas.notes: States that microorganisms can be used to clean pollutants and maintain ecosystem balance
